evidence.scope: files=multiple surface=codex lifecycle scripts, skills, templates, task artifacts
evidence.behavior: multiple lifecycle workflow fixes covering ACAC orchestration, planning setup, staging, landing, and review revalidation
evidence.dependency: interfaces=script contracts, stage skill instructions, task templates, git workflow command boundaries
evidence.uncertainty: some failures were reported from external repositories and must be reproduced or covered with local fixtures
evidence.verification: checks=script health, stage validators, targeted fixture tests, lint/build/test command-class outcomes
evidence.guardrails: no schema/api contract change; no new external dependencies; lifecycle surface only; reversible with script and fixture verification
